step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and messy bun styling, body proportions, deep burgundy cropped tank and bike shorts outfit, white trainers, and the entire premium gym scene including the lifting bench, dumbbell rack, black rubber flooring, and exposed-brick wall — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. The Alluvi product is now placed on the lifting bench surface beside her right thigh as the foreground hero of the composition, front face angled toward the camera, with a stainless steel water bottle standing just behind it and a small folded grey gym towel resting beside both items. The product is approximately 7 inches wide and 3 inches tall, sized realistically relative to the water bottle and towel on the bench. Do not enlarge the product beyond its actual proportions. Her body posture and arm position may shift slightly to make the seated recovery moment feel natural alongside the bench arrangement. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — both forearms continue to rest forward on her thighs with relaxed fingers. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the warm pendant light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white amber. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: warm overhead industrial pendant light slightly behind her creating a soft warm rim, with cooler ambient fill from the gym ceiling, casting a soft shadow on the bench surface in front of the product.
